experiment: midtrain-calibration (PoC): midtraining on calibrated-CARA behavior docs + constitutional distillation
backend: tinker (managed LoRA; SFT document-finetune + onpolicy_reverse_kl prompted-teacher distill)
note: Pointers, not weights. tinker:// URIs may be impermanent — re-train from the recipe below if they 404. Public repo: no raw eval JSONs (they embed local paths), no bucket bytes.

provenance.gcs: <your-artifact-bucket>/midtrain-calibration/ (configure results.gcs in configs/config.yaml; artifacts on request)

corpus.audit: 0/1088 docs match any benchmark gamble-menu format marker (clean); markers in scripts/generate_corpus.py BENCHMARK_LEAK_PATTERNS

midtrain.method: aligne.train.tinker.run_sft (cross-entropy LoRA) on lone-assistant-turn docs = continued pretraining / document finetune

distill.method: aligne.train.tinker.run_reverse_kl (on-policy reverse-KL from a risk_averse-constitution-prompted BASE teacher); the full-rerun risk_averse recipe
distill.prompts: risk_seeds (repeat-shuffled to max_steps x groups_per_batch rows)
distill.resume: student initialized from the midtrain checkpoint via load_checkpoint_path (the midtrain state_path)

checkpoints.label: (a) constitutional distillation alone
checkpoints.note: REUSED unchanged from the full-rerun-v1 risk_averse distill (constitution-distill checkpoints.json full_rerun_v2). Not retrained here.
